name: Quad SPI Displays
description: This display driver supports AMOLED and LCD displays with quad SPI interfaces, using the MIPI DBI interface.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `5s`.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: The chip select pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Dimensions
config_entries.description: Dimensions of the screen, specified either as *width* **x** *height* (e.g `320x240`  ) or with separate config keys.

config_entries.label: Height
config_entries.description: Specifies height of display in pixels.

config_entries.label: Width
config_entries.description: Specifies width of display.

config_entries.label: Offset Height
config_entries.description: Specify an offset for the y-direction of the display. Default is 0.

config_entries.label: Offset Width
config_entries.description: Specify an offset for the x-direction of the display, typically used when a display is smaller than the maximum supported by the driver chip. Default is 0

config_entries.label: Enable Pin
config_entries.description: The display enable pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Reset Pin
config_entries.description: The RESET pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: Whether to automatically clear the display data before each lambda call, or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change). Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Brightness
config_entries.description: A brightness value in the range 0-255

config_entries.label: Color Order
config_entries.description: Should be one of `rgb` (default) or `bgr`.

config_entries.label: Data Rate
config_entries.description: Set the data rate of the SPI interface to the display. One of `80MHz`, `40MHz`, `20MHz`, `10MHz` (default), `5MHz`, `2MHz` or `1MHz`.

config_entries.label: Draw From Origin
config_entries.description: When set, all partial display updates will start at the origin (0,0). Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Draw Rounding
config_entries.description: Caters for display chips that require partial drawing to be aligned to certain boundaries. Default is 2, must be a power of 2.

config_entries.label: Draw Rounding
config_entries.description: Caters for display chips that require partial drawing to be aligned to certain boundaries. Default is 2, must be a power of 2.

config_entries.label: Init Sequence
config_entries.description: Specifies the init sequence for the display. This is required when using the `CUSTOM` model - but may be empty. If specified for other models this data will be sent after the pre-configured sequence.

config_entries.label: Invert Colors
config_entries.description: With this boolean option you can invert the display colors.

config_entries.label: Invert Colors
config_entries.description: With this boolean option you can invert the display colors.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description: Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Rotate the display presentation in software. Choose one of `0°`, `90°`, `180°`, or `270°`.

config_entries.label: SPI Mode
config_entries.description: Set the mode for the SPI interface to the display. Default is `MODE0`.

config_entries.label: Transform
config_entries.description: Transform the display presentation using hardware. All defaults are `false`. This option cannot be used with `rotation`.

config_entries.label: Mirror X
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the x axis.

config_entries.label: Mirror Y
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the y axis.

config_entries.label: Transform
config_entries.description: Transform the display presentation using hardware. All defaults are `false`. This option cannot be used with `rotation`.

config_entries.label: Mirror X
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the x axis.

config_entries.label: Mirror Y
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the y axis.

config_entries.label: Swap Xy
config_entries.description: If true, exchange the x and y axes. Not available for some chips
